meta.description: Smell index for Swift. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: Force unwrap
smells.summary: ! applied to a value that can be nil at runtime.

smells.name: Force cast
smells.summary: as! used where as? plus guard would be safer.

smells.name: try! on throwing call
smells.summary: try! used where errors must be handled.

smells.name: MainActor blocking
smells.summary: Heavy sync work on the main actor.

smells.name: Class as value
smells.summary: class used for a type that should be a struct.

smells.name: (T?, Error?) callback
smells.summary: Legacy callback shape instead of Result or async throws.

smells.name: Positive: actor isolation
smells.summary: actor used for shared mutable state.
